headline: The Week Ahead In Biotech: Urogen FDA Decision, Amarin, J&J Earnings And More COVID-19 Updates
summary: Biotech stocks moved higher last week along with the broader market. The week witnessed a few clinical readouts and pre-announcements that reflected the coronavirus (COVID-19) impact.

headline: Barron's Picks And Pans: Berkshire Hathaway, Disney, SoftBank And More
summary:
This weekend's Barron's cover story examines how the economy will be changed by the COVID-19 pandemic.
	Other featured articles wonder at the silence from Warren Buffett and discuss where to find safe dividends.

headline: The Week In Cannabis: Charlotte Figi's Passing, Epidiolex's De-Scheduling, Stocks Up And More
summary:
A shortened week came with a no shortage of news for the cannabis community and industry.

We must start with a deeply sad event: the passing of 13-year-old Charlotte Figi in the hands of COVID-19.
